info.name: Analytics
info.description:
The Analytics API lets you query for insights about parcels, products and transit times.

Contact Support:
 Name: Sendcloud API Support
 Email: contact@sendcloud.com

request.description: Returns data about parcels as a series, e.g. the number of parcels per day/month/year over a specified period.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description: Returns data about parcels as buckets. Buckets should be grouped by any category, for example by country.

query.description: (Required) value for the last number of days

request.description: Returns number of parcels for the last number of days selected.

query.description: (Required) value for the last number of days
(Required) value for the last number of days

request.description: Returns data about products as a series, e.g. the number of products per day/month/year over a specified period.
Returns data about products as buckets. Buckets should be grouped by any category, for example by country.

Retrieves the average transit time of a parcel per carrier.
You can filter the results by origin and destination country, as well as by start and end dates.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description:
Retrieves the average transit time of a parcel per shipping method and carrier.
You can filter the results by origin and destination country, as well as start and end dates.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Retrieve all shipping methods used by user

request.description: Returns a list of all shipping methods ever used by a user.

item.name: Retrieve all carriers used by user

request.description: Returns a list of all carriers ever used by a user.
